headline: This is Why Zebra Technologies Corporation (ZBRA) is a Cheap Robotics Stock to Buy
summary: Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ:ZBRA) is one of the cheap robotics stocks to buy right now. On May 14, BNP Paribas reiterated an Outperform rating on Zebra Technologies (NASDAQ:ZBRA) and raised the price target to $370 from $365. The bullish stance and price target hike come amid the robotics company’s solid first-quarter results, which exceeded expectations. […]
